summary: Technical leader and fullstack engineer passionate about product and developer experience. I build tools that delight both customers and engineers.

experience.title: Software Engineer - Tech Lead Manager
highlights: Automated on-call triage: Engineered a self-hosted system that orchestrates AI coding agents to triage bug reports using static code and production data. Reduced manual triage time by 20 hours per on-call engineer per week.

Reduced API timeouts 80%: Led quarter-long performance initiatives including query tuning, index optimization, and read-replica utilization. Refactored data ingestion pipelines to meet SLAs for high-volume enterprise customers.
Delivered enterprise features: Shipped SAML SSO, RBAC, SCIM, audit logging, and OAuth-based API integrations for $150K+ ARR customers. Partnered with the PM to prioritize roadmaps.
Standardized observability: Implemented OpenTelemetry (OTel) across frontend and backend services, reducing vendor lock-in and unifying monitoring practices org-wide.

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Completed MV3 migration: Directed a team to complete a time-sensitive migration of Gem's Chrome extension (20,000 active users) to MV3 with minimal customer disruption. Migrated the codebase to TypeScript and modernized the observability stack to enhance developer experience.
Shipped Talent Marketing suite: Built forms, landing pages, and event management from scratch — enabling recruiters to run campaigns without marketing team dependencies. Drove $300K in new ARR.

experience.title: Senior - Lead MTS
highlights: Built Kubernetes lifecycle agent: Developed tooling to manage Mule application deployments in Kubernetes clusters. Designed event-stream architecture enabling reliable monitoring for 1000+ deployments per cluster with minimal resource overhead.

Led EKS migration: Migrated from legacy EC2 infrastructure to Amazon EKS, improving scalability and reducing costs. Achieved 99.99% uptime, cut application startup times 30%, and increased deployment density.

experience.title: Member of Technical Staff (MTS)
highlights: Pioneered React component library: Built reusable UI components for CloudHub (MuleSoft's PaaS), later adopted company-wide. Developed and maintained core frontend features serving enterprise deployment workflows.
